Short CV

Onur Coşkun completed his undergraduate education at Beykent University, Faculty of Communication, Department of New Media (English).  Later,  he received his master's degree from İstanbul University, Institute of Social Sciences, Department of Public Relations and Publicity, New Media and Communication Management Program, with  the thesis titled "The Position of Digital Reproductive Labor in the Classroom: Digital Workers in the Fluid Modern Age". Onur Coşkun, who started his doctorate education at İstanbul University, Institute of Social Sciences, Department of Public Relations and Publicity in 2023, worked as an SEO-compatible content producer and audit specialist in the digital media and marketing sectors.
